GIANT_SLAYER_HOOK.name: GIANT SLAYER HOOK
description: Use your Grappling Hook to pull yourself towards large enemies during combat.
Cost: 50 Stamina

GROUNDING_HOOK.name: GROUNDING HOOK
description: Use your Grappling Hook to pull flying enemies towards you during combat.
Cost: 50 Stamina

SAVIOUR.name: SAVIOUR
description: Time to revive an ally is reduced by -1 seconds.
Default revive time is 6 seconds.

BACKSTAB_DAMAGE.name: BACKSTAB MASTERY
description: Backstab damage is increased by 20%

OPPORTUNITY.name: OPPORTUNITY
description: Increases the damage multiplier of Merciless Attacks by {{value}}%.

MINER.name: MINER
description: Mining resources has a 10% chance to grant one additional resource.

LUMBERJACK.name: LUMBERJACK
description: Tool deals {{value}}% increased damage against wood.
This includes trees and wooden terrain.

QUALITY_GEAR.name: QUALITY GEAR
description: Tools have a 20% chance to restore 1 durability point

MASON.name: MASON
description: Tools deal {{value}}% increased damage against stone.
This includes stone terrain and gemstone veins.

FISHERMANS_RESOLVE.name: FISHERMAN'S RESOLVE
description: Increases your Fishing Endurance by {{value}}.
Allows for extended battles with hooked fish.

POWER_PARRY.name: POWER PARRY
description: Your Parry Power is increased by {{value}}%.

Parry
A well-timed block with any Melee weapon or Shield will parry the attack and fill up the enemy's Stun Bar.

Overpower
Attacking blocking enemies or parrying their attacks fills their Stun Bar until they become overpowered.
Overpowered enemies are open for Merciless Attacks.
Unlocks Special Abilities of Felling Axes. Press [R] to unleash a powerful Special Ability after generating enough Focus.

Focus
Generate Focus by attacking. Focus can be built up with any weapon type and is used to trigger Special Abilities of weapons.
Unlocks Special Abilities of Pickaxes. Press [R] to unleash a powerful Special Ability after generating enough Focus.

Focus
Generate Focus by attacking. Focus can be built up with any weapon type and is used to trigger Special Abilities of weapons.
Tools deal {{value}} increased damage against metal. This includes metal ore veins.

Focus
Generate Focus by attacking. Focus can be built up with any weapon type and is used to trigger Special Abilities of weapons.

ATTR_SPIRIT.name: SPIRIT
description: Increases your Spirit attribute by 1.
Increases Mana by 20 per Attribute Point.

ATTR_INT.name: INTELLIGENCE
description: Increases your Intelligence attribute by 1.
Increases Magic damage by 5% per Attribute Point.

ATTR_CONS.name: CONSTITUTION
description: Increases your Constitution attribute by 1.
Increases Health by 50 per Attribute Point.

ATTR_STR.name: STRENGTH
description: Increases your Strength attribute by 1.
Increases Melee damage by 5% per Attribute Point.

ATTR_ENDURANCE.name: ENDURANCE
description: Increases your Endurance attribute by 1.
Increases Stamina by 10 per Attribute Point.

ATTR_DEX.name: DEXTERITY
description: Increases your Dexterity attribute by 1.
Increases Bow and Dagger damage by 5% per Attribute Point.

WELL_RESTED.name: WELL RESTED
description: The base duration for the Rested buff is increased by {{value}} minutes.

Rested
The Rested buff increases your Stamina Maximum and Regeneration significantly.
It requires shelter, sitting or sleeping, as well as warmth from a heat source.
The buff can be refreshed anywhere.
Surrounding comfort items further increase its duration.

SNEAK_ATTACK.name: SNEAK ATTACK
description: Perform a Sneak Attack by sneaking up to an unaware enemy and pressing [E].
Sneak Attack deals +900% increased damage.

MERCILESS_ATTACK.name: MERCILESS ATTACK
description: Perform a Merciless Attack by pressing [E] to deal +500% damage to an overpowered enemy.

Overpower
Attacking blocking enemies or parrying their attacks fills their Stun Bar until they become overpowered.
Overpowered enemies are open for Merciless Attacks.

UPDRAFT.name: UPDRAFT
description: Jumping with [SPACE] while gliding lifts you upwards. Can be used once per flight.

Charge
As the Updraft charges before activation, the resulting lift is increased. A full charge grants you an additional boost. The charge is accelerated while inside your base.
Cost: 100 Mana

BEGONE.name: BEGONE!
description: A magic-powered punch that pushes back and stuns enemies.
Replaces your unarmed attacks as long as you have the necessary Mana available.
Cost: 30 Mana

RADIANT_AURA.name: RADIANT AURA
description: All Fell enemies within {{value}} meters take {{value2}} Fire damage per Intelligence per second.

WATER_AURA.name: WATER AURA
description: You emit a healing aura that heals you and all injured allies within {{value}} meters.
The healing scales with your intelligence attribute and restores 1 Health per 2 points of intelligence.

MARTYR.name: MARTYR
description: When you are killed by an enemy, all allies within 30 meters are healed for 50% of their maximum health.
They also receive a Final Blessing buff, increasing their maximum Health by 100 points for 15 minutes.

DIVINE_SURGE.name: DIVINE SURGE
description: Healing spells can perform Critical Strikes that scale with your Critical Strike damage.

RIGHTEOUS_FIRE.name: RIGHTEOUS FIRE
description: Healing any target with a spell triggers a burst of fire that deals {{value}}% of the heal amount as Fire damage to nearby Fell enemies.

BLINK.name: BLINK
description: Replaces the Dodge Roll ability with a short-range teleport.
Blink also replaces the sideways Dodge Roll of the Strategig Maneuver skill
Cost: 20 Stamina

EVASION_ATTACK.name: EVASION ATTACK
description: When equipped with a Melee weapon, you can perform an evade attack, which dashes towards the enemy and deals more weapon damage with [LMB]
Cost: 20 Stamina

Block Breaker
This special attack fills a blocking enemy's Stun Bar twice as much when hit.

EARTH_AURA.name: EARTH AURA
description: You emit a protective aura that increases Physical an Magical Resistances by 10% for you and all allies within {{value}} meters.

NEMESIS.name: NEMESIS
description: Increase the attention you draw from enemies by {{value}}%.

SHOCKWAVE.name: SHOCKWAVE
description: Trigger a Shockwave when you parry an attack or overpower an enemy.
The Shockwave pushes back nearby enemies. It also fills their Stun Bar, scaling with your Strength attribute.

Overpower
Attacking blocking enemies or parrying their attacks fills their Stun Bar until they become overpowered.
Overpowered enemies are open for Merciless Attacks.

HEAVY_SPECIALIZATION.name: HEAVY HITTER
description: Increases the attack speed of all Two-Handed Melee weapons by 10%.

BASH.name: BASH
description: Parrying enemy attacks bashes them for {{value}} Blunt damage. Bash damage is increased by your Strength attribute.

Parry
A well-timed block with any Melee weapon or Shield will parry the attack and fill up the enemy's Stun Bar.

WHIRLWIND_CRESCENDO.name: WHIRLWIND CRESCENDO
description: When equipped with a Two-Handed weapon, trigger a whirl attack at the end of an attack chain.
Cost: 75 Stamina

CRASH_DOWN_ATTACK.name: CRASH DOWN ATTACK
description: When equipped with a Melee weapon, you can perform a special attack by holding [LMB] during a jump.
Crash Down deals 50% more weapon damage in a small blast radius and costs Stamina depending on weapon type used.
Cost: 35-60 Stamina

Block Breaker
This special attack fills a blocking enemy's Stun Bar twice as much when hit.

CRASH_DOWN_FORCE.name: Crash Down: Force
description: When attacking from a double jump, Crash Down deals 20% more weapon damage.

DOUBLE_JUMP.name: DOUBLE JUMP
description: Allows jumping a second time while airborne.
Cost: 10 Stamina

DESSERT_STOMACH.name: DESSERT STOMACH
description: You gain one additional Food slot

LAST_MEAL.name: LAST MEAL
description: Your Food buffs persist through death, but they last half as long.

EAGLE_EYE.name: EAGLE EYE
description: Greatly increases the zoom while aiming with Bows.
To aim, hold down the [RMB] while a bow is selected in the Action bar. (Alternatively, hold [Q] to aim your equipped bow.)

MULTI_SHOT.name: MULTI SHOT
description: Shooting Regular Arrows has a 20% chance to spawn a Flurry of Arrows that spreads slightly.
Regular Arrows fired this way will substract from your ammunition.
Flurry of Arrows does not trigger on Special Arrows.

MULTI_SHOT_SPREAD.name: MULTI SHOT SPREAD
description: Adds a 25% chance to spawn an additional Regular Arrow with your Flurry of Arrows from the Multi Shot skill.
This additional Regular Arrow does not subtract from your ammunition.

MULTI_SHOT_TRIGGER.name: MULTI SHOT TRIGGER
description: Shooting Special Arrows now triggers a Flurry of Arrows from the Multi Shot skill.
Special Arrows fired this way will subtract from your ammunition.

BEE_STING.name: BEE STING
description: Firing or aiming your Bow while airborne slowes down your fall briefly. Every shot lifts you slightly, granting more airtime.
Cost: 10 stamina per second

SHELL_SHOCK.name: SHELL SHOCK
description: Infuse your Ranged Explosives with Mana. They now stun enemies for 2 seconds.
Cost: 8 Mana per stunned enemy

COUNTERSTRIKE.name: COUNTERSTRIKE
description: After receiving damage, there is a {{value}}% chance to reflect {{value2}}% of the damage back to the attacker as Fire damage.
This magical attack can trigger other skills.

TERROR.name: TERROR
description: Critical Strikes with spells have a {{value}}% chance to stun the target for 2 seconds.

SHOCK_RESISTANCE.name: SHOCK RESISTANCE
description: Increases your Shock Resistance by {{value}}% which reduces the amount of Shock damage received.

QUICK_CHARGE.name: QUICK CHARGE
description: Cast Time of spells is reduced by {{value}}%.

THIS_IS_THE_WAY.name: MAGE APPRENTICE
description: Magic weapon damage is increased by {{value}}%.

ARSONIST.name: ARSONIST
description: All Fire damage is increased by {{value}}%.

SUN_AURA.name: RADIANT AURA
description: All Fell enemies within {{value}} meters take {{value2}} Fire damage per Intelligence per second.

FIRE_RESISTANCE.name: FIRE RESISTANCE
description: Increases your Fire Resistance by {{value}}%, which reduces the amount of Fire damage received.

THUNDER.name: THUNDER
description: All Shock damage is increased by {{value}}%.

LIGHTNING.name: LIGHTNING
description: All shock damage is increased by an additional 20%.

ICEMAN.name: ICEMAN
description: All Ice damage is increased by {{value}}%.

SUBZERO.name: SUBZERO
description: All ice damage is increased by an additional 20%.

FROST.name: FROST
description: When receiving Melee damage, the attacker will be slowed down for {{value}} seconds.

ICE_RESISTANCE.name: ICE RESISTANCE
description: Increases your Ice Resistance by {{value}}% which reduces the amount of Ice damage received.

WIZARD.name: WIZARD
description: Magic weapon Critical Strike chance is increased by {{value}}%.

DARK_ARTS.name: DARK ARTS
description: All Shroud damage is increased by {{value}}%.

ABYSS.name: ABYSS
description: All Shrouded damage is increased by an additional 20%.

CHAIN_HIT.name: CHAIN HIT
description: Critical Strikes with Magic weapon will automatically hit a second enemy within 15 meters for 5 Shock damage per intelligence.

MASS_DESTRUCTION.name: MASS DESTRUCTION
description: Critical Strikes with a Magic weapons deal 2 Shock damage per intelligence to all enemies whithin {{value}} meters of the target.

NECROMANCER.name: NECROMANCER
description: When killing an enemy with a Magic weapon, you have a {{value}}% chance to summon a friendly Skull Companion.

HEALER.name: HEALER
description: Health gain from healing spells and skills is increased by {{value}}%.

HEALER_II.name: HEALER II
description: Health gain from healing spells will be increased by 20%

HEALING_REVIVE.name: HEALING REVIVE
description: Revive players with {{value}}% increased Health.
default Health of revived players is 10%.

SHROUD_FILTER.name: SHROUD FILTER
description: Dealing damage with a Magic weapon has a {{value}}% chance to trigger a small flame burst that restores 9 seconds of Time in the Shroud to you and your allies within 20 meters.

Shroud Time
Should this time run out, the Shroud will consume you.

WATERS_OF_LIFE.name: WATERS OF LIFE
description: Increases Water Aura healing to 2 Health per 2 points of Intelligence.

SHROUD_RESISTANCE.name: SHROUD RESISTANCE
description: Increases your Shroud Resistance by {{value}}% which reduces the amount of Shroud damage received.

SHROUD_MISTERY.name: SHARED MISERY
description: When you receive Shroud damage, all players within {{value}}-meters receive 15% increased Shroud Resistance for 30 seconds.

EMERGENCY_BLINK.name: EMERGENCY BLINK
description: You can blink while being stunned. This will break the stunned state.

BLINK_ATTACK.name: BLINK ATTACK
description: Blinking into an enemy triggers an explosion which deals Fire damage in a small radius.
Damage and Mana cost scale with the Intelligence attribute.

ARCANE_DEFLECTION.name: ARCANE DEFLECTION
description: Successfully parrying an enemy's attack restores {{value}} Mana.

Parry
A well-timed block with any Melee weapon or Shield will parry the attack and fill up the enemy's Stun Bar.

UNITY.name: UNITY
description: Damaging enemies with Wands has a {{value}}% chance to restore {{value2}}% of your maximum Mana.

ARCANE_PROLIFERATION.name: ARCANE PROLIFERATION
description: Wand attacks have a 30% chance to spawn double the amount of projectiles. Extra projectiles spawned deal 50% less damage.

ETERNAL_SPARK.name: ETERNAL SPARK
description: Dealing damage with Wand projectiles has a {{value}}% chance to restore 1 durability to that weapon.

STING.name: STING
description: Repeated Wand damage is increased by 20%.

BATTLE_HEAL.name: BATTLE HEAL
description: Critical Strikes with Melee weapon heal you for {{value}}% of your maximum Health.

BLOODLETTING.name: BLOODLETTING
description: Critical Strikes with spells have a {{value}}% chance to spawn 2 Health, Mana, and/or Stamina Orbs.
Gathering an Orb restores 10% of the respective resource.

LIFE_BURST.name: LIFE BURST
description: Defeating an enemy with a Magic weapon restores Health equal to 3 times your Intelligence to all players within 15 meters of the target.

BLOOD_MAGIC.name: BLOOD MAGIC
description: When your Mana drops below 20%, you restore up to 35% of your maximum Mana at the cost of 1 Health per Mana restored.
This effect stops at 1 Health.
Cooldown: 2 minutes

ABSORB.name: ABSORB
description: When you receive Magic damage, you have a {{value}}% chance to restore 1 Mana per Health point lost.

SNAP.name: SNAP
description: Triggering a Merciless Attack restores 10% Mana.

SOUL_LEECH.name: SOUL LEECH
description: When killing an enemy with a Melee weapon, all players within {{value}} meters of the target restore {{value2}} Mana.

SHINY_PLATES.name: SHINY PLATES
description: Equipped armor grants {{value}}% increased Magical Armor

HEAVY_PLATES.name: HEAVY PLATES
description: Equipped armor grants {{value}}% increased Physical Armor

ONE_HANDED_SPECIALIZATION.name: One-Handed Specialization
description: Unlocks Special Abilities of One-Handed Melee weapons. Press [R] to unleash a powerful Special Ability after generating enough Focus

Focus
Generate Focus by attacking. Focus can be built up with any weapon type and is used to trigger Special Abilities of weapons.

WARDEN.name: WARDEN
description: While there are three or more enemies within 20 meters, you receive 10% increased Magical Resistance.

TOWER.name: TOWER
description: While there are three or more enemies within 20 meters, you receive 10% increased Physical Resistance

ARCH_NEMESIS.name: ARCH NEMESIS
description: Whenever an ally draws the attention of an enemy, you draw twice as much.

PURIFICATION.name: PURIFICATION
description: Defeating a Shroud infested enemy with a Melee weapon restores {{value}} seconds of Time in the Shroud.

Shroud Time
Should this time run out, the Shroud will consume you.

WARRIOR_PATH.name: WARRIOR'S PATH
description: One-Handed Melee weapon damage is increased by {{value}}%.

THRUST.name: THRUST
description: Melee Piercing damage is increased by {{value}}%.

PIERCE.name: PIERCE
description: All melee piercing damage is increased by an additional 20%.

BRUTE.name: BRUTE
description: Melee Blunt damage is increased by {{value}}%.

HAMMER_TIME.name: HAMMER TIME
description: All melee blunt damage is increased by an additional 20%.

SLASHER.name: SLASHER
description: Melee Cutting damage is increased by {{value}}%.

BUTCHER.name: BUTCHER
description: All melee cutting damage is increased by an additional 20%.

VETERAN.name: VETERAN
description: Melee weapon Critical Strike chance is increased by {{value}}%.

TITAN_EDGE.name: TITAN EDGE
description: Two-Handed Greatsword damage is increased by {{value}}%.

SWIFT_BLADES.name: SWIFT BLADES
description: Increase the attack speed of all One-Handed Melee weapons by 15%.

FEAST.name: FEAST
description: Meat now increases health by an additional 15%.

HEAVY_HANDED.name: HEAVY HANDED
description: Filling up enemy Stun Bars is increased by {{value}} when attacking blocking enemies with Melee weapons.

Overpower
Attacking blocking enemies or parrying their attacks fills their Stun Bar until they become overpowered.
Overpowered enemies are open for Merciless Attacks.

STEADFAST.name: STEADFAST
description: Defeating an enemy with a melee weapon restores {{value}} durability to that weapon.

UPWARDS_SLASH_ATTACK.name: UPWARDS SLASH ATTACK
description: When equipped with a Melee weapon, launch a powerful upward strike during the ascent of your jump.
Use this skill to rapidly close the distance on flying enemies.
Cost: 25 Stamina

BREACH.name: BREACH
description: Overpowered enemies receive +100% increased Melee physical damage for 3 seconds.

Overpower
Attacking blocking enemies or parrying their attacks fills their Stun Bar until they become overpowered.
Overpowered enemies are open for Merciless Attacks.

RELENTLESS.name: RELENTLESS
description: Critical Strikes with Two-Handed weapons increase your Critical Strike chance by 8% for the next hit.

BARBARIAN.name: BARBARIAN
description: Gain one point of Strength for every two levels of the Flame.

BLOOD_RAGE.name: BLOOD RAGE
description: When an enemy within {{value}} meters is killed by a Melee weapon, you fall into Blood Rage

Blood Rage
Increases Melee weapon damage by 15% for 10 seconds.

VIGOROUS_DEFLECTION.name: VIGOROUS DEFLECTION
description: Succesfully parrying an enemy's attack restore {{value}} Stamina.

Parry
A well-timed block with any Melee weapon or Shield will parry the attack and fill up the enemy's Stun Bar.

BLOOD_WARRIOR.name: BLOOD WARRIOR
description: Defeating an enemy with a Sneak Attack or Merciless Attack spawns a Health Orb.
Gathering an Orb restores 10% of the respective resource.

WET_DOG.name: WET DOG
description: Weakens the effect of the Wet and Soaked debuffs.
Stamina and Stamina Regeneration is reduced by 20% instead of 30%.

Wet
Reduces Stamina and Stamina Regeneration by 30% for 15 minutes. Warmth reduces the remaining duration.

Soaked
Reduces Stamina and Stamina Regeneration by 30% for 30 seconds. Also reduces Ice and Shock Resistances by 30% but increases Fire Resistances by 30%.
Soaked can be applied to enemies.
Soaked duration can not be reduced by warmth and Wet debuff starts after it is over.

SOAKED_DOG.name: SOAKED DOG
description: Weakens the effect of the Wet and Soaked debuffs.
Stamina and Stamina Regeneration are reduced by 10% instead of 20%.

Wet
Reduces Stamina and Stamina Regeneration by 30% for 15 minutes. Warmth reduces the remaining duration.

Soaked
Reduces Stamina and Stamina Regeneration by 30% for 30 seconds. Also reduces Ice and Shock Resistances by 30% but increases Fire Resistances by 30%.
Soaked can be applied to enemies.
Soaked duration can not be reduced by warmth and Wet debuff starts after it is over.

SPLASH_DASH.name: SPLASH DASH
description: Allows you to perform an evasive dash while swimming or diving.
Cost: 40 Stamina

FINESSE.name: FINESSE
description: Dealing damage with One-Handed Melee weapons and daggers has a {{value}}% chance to restore 1 durability to that weapon.

JUMP_ATTACK_II.name: CRASH DOWN: FORCE
description: When attacking from a double jump, Crash Down deals 20% more weapon damage.

BACKSTAB_MASTERY.name: BACKSTAB MASTERY
description: Backstab damage is increased by {{value}}%.

RUNNER.name: RUNNER
description: Sprint Speed is increased by {{value}}% and Stamina cost while sprinting is decreased by {{value2}}%.

WANDERLUST.name: WANDERLUST
description: Stamina cost for sprinting on dirt roads is reduced from 90% to 80%. Stamina cost for sprinting on stone roads is reduced from 75% to 50%.

GOOD_METABOLISM.name: GOOD METABOLISM
description: Health, Mana, and Stamina Orbs restore 30% instead of 10% of their respective resource.
Health and Mana Potions restore 20% more resources.

SWIFTSHOT_SUSTENANCE.name: SWIFTSHOT SUSTENANCE
description: Defeating an enemy with a Bow has a {{value}}% chance to spawn a Stamina Orb.
Gathering an Orb restores 10% of the respective resource.

SWEET_TOOTH.name: SWEET TOOTH
description: Stamina Regeneration of sweets is increased by 50%.

ARACHNOID.name: ARACHNOID
description: Stamina cost while climbing is reduced by {{value}}%.

REBOUND.name: REBOUND
description: Base Stamina Regeneration is increased {{value}}%.

REBOUND_II.name: REBOUND
description: Increase base stamina regeneration by 50%

INNER_FIRES.name: INNER FIRES
description: Time in the Shroud is increased by {{value}} min, allowing you to explore for longer.

Shroud Time
Should this time run out, the Shroud will consume you.

RELENTLESS_FLAME.name: RELENTLESS FLAME
description: Maximum Shroud Time increased by 5 minutes, allowing you to explore for longer.

Shroud Time
Should this time run out, the Shroud will consume you.

SNAKE_EATER.name: SNAKE EATER
description: Increases your Poison Resistance by {{value}}%, which reduces the amount of Poison damage received.

MITHRIDATIST.name: MITHRIDATIST
description: Gain a 25% chance to avoid being poisoned.

DAGGER_MASTERY.name: DAGGER MASTERY
description: Increases damage dealt with daggers by {{value}}%.

SLICE_AND_DICE.name: SLICE AND DICE
description: After a Critical Strike with a Dagger, the base damage of your next Bow attack within 20 seconds is increased by 50%.

VUKAH_LANGUAGE.name: VUKAH LANGUAGE
description: Vukah within 50 meters will no longer attack you unless provoked.

CALM_SPIRIT.name: CALM SPIRIT
description: Wild Animals within 50 meters will be no longer attack you unless provoked.
Does not affect animals corrupted by the Shroud.

BEAST_MASTER.name: BEAST MASTER
description: When you are targeted by an attack, Wild Animals within 50 meters will attack the enemy.

VUKAH_CULTURE.name: VUKAH CULTURE
description: When you are targeted by an attack, Vukah within 50 meters will attack the enemy.

ENDURANCE_OF_THE_FLAME.name: ENDURANCE OF THE FLAME
description: Gain one point of Endurance for every two levels of the Flame.

MARKSMAN.name: MARKSMAN
description: Damage with Bows is increased by {{value}}%

SHARPSHOOTER.name: SHARPSHOOTER
description: All ranged damage is increased by an additional 20%

COUNTER_BATTERY.name: COUNTER BATTERY
description: Damage against ranged enemies is increased by {{value}}%.

EAGLES_BANE.name: EAGLES BANE
description: Damage against flying enemies is increased by {{value}}%.

SKILL_SHOT.name: SKILL SHOT
description: Skillshot damage is increased by {{value}}%.

Skillshot
Striking enemy weak points, such as heads or exposed hearts, is considered a Skillshot.

RANGER.name: RANGER
description: Increases your Dexterity and Endurace attributes by {{value}}.
Base Stamina Regeneration is increased by {{value2}},

SILENT_STRIDE.name: SILENT STRIDE
description: Increases your movement speed while sneaking by {{value}}%.

KICK.name: KICK
description: When equipped with a Melee weapon you can perform a Kick by attacking while blocking.
Kick deals little damage but hits the target with massive force and pushes them back, filling their Stun Bar.
Stun Bar increase scales with Dexterity. Stun time depends on the enemy's size.

Overpower
Attacking blocking enemies or parrying their attacks fills their Stun Bar until they become overpowered.
Overpowered enemies are open for Merciless Attacks.

AIRBORNE.name: AIRBORNE
description: Gliders consume {{value}}% less Stamina

SNIPER.name: SNIPER
description: Ranged weapon Critical Strike chance is increased by {{value}}%.

VITALITY_SURGE.name: VITALITY SURGE
description: Critical Strikea with Ranged weapons restore {{value}} Stamina.

BLESSED_ARROWS.name: BLESSED ARROWS
description: Critical Strikes with Bowsrestore {{value}} mana.

BOUNTY_BONANZA.name: BOUNTY BONANZA
description: After defeating a Fell enemy with a Skillshot, your group gains an additional +5 Experience Points.

Skillshot
Striking enemy weak points, such as heads or exposed hearts, is considered a Skillshot.

RICOCHETS.name: RICOCHETS
description: For every target you hit with an Explosive Arrow, its damage is increased by 1%.

GRACEFUL_STRIDE.name: GRACEFUL STRIDE
description: Gain one point of Dexterity for every two levels of the Flame.

CHAIN_REACTION.name: CHAIN REACTION
description: Every enemy hit with an Explosive Arrow has a 20% chance to trigger a secondary explosion for 50% damage in a small radius.

ARCANE_CONCENTRATION.name: ARCANE CONCENTRATION
description: Gain one point of Spirit for every two levels of the Flame.

EXALTED.name: EXALTED
description: Gain one point of Intelligence for every two levels of the Flame.

THICK_SKIN.name: THICK SKIN
description: Gain one point of Constitution for every two levels of the Flame.

LIFE_ESSENCES.name: LIFE ESSENCES
description: Increase your maximum Health by {{value}} times your Intelligence attribute.

POISONED_BLADES.name: VENOMOUS BLADES
description: Increases the chance to poison enemies to 25% when using Daggers with the Venomous Blades perk.

POISON_MASTERY.name: VENOM MASTERY
description: Increases the damage dealt with the Venomous Blades Dagger perk by 100%.

QUICK_REFLEX_BLOCK.name: QUICK REFLEX BLOCK
description: Briefly enhances your block value when blocking with Daggers, ensuring a near-miss parry reduces stamina minimally.

EXPOSE_WEAKNESS.name: EXPOSE WEAKNESS
description: Critical Strikes with Daggers increase damage dealt to the enemy by 25% for 5 seconds.

BARBARIAN_PATH.name: Barbarian's Path
description: Two-Handed Melee weapon damage is increased by {{value}}.

TWO_HANDED_SPECIALIZATION.name: Two-Handed Specialization
description: Unlocks Special Abilities of Two-Handed Melee weapons. Press [R] to unleash a powerful Special Ability after generating enough Focus.

Focus
Generate Focus by attacking. Focus can be built up with any weapon type and is used to trigger Special Abilities of weapons.
Increases your maximum Health by {{value}} times your Strength attribute.

Use it to roll around your enemies, making it easier to flank them or deliver backstabs.
Blink replaces the sideways Dodge Roll of the Strategic Maneuver skill.
Cost: 20 Stamina
Damage against Vukah is increased by {{value}}.

Focus

Focus

Throwable damage is increased by {{value}}%.
